heading: Treatment of certain individuals as veterans, disabled veterans, and preference eligibles
label: 2108a Treatment of certain individuals as veterans, disabled veterans, and preference eligibles

children.label: A
children.text: meets the definition of a veteran under section 2108(1), except for the requirement that the individual has been discharged or released from active duty in the armed forces under honorable conditions; and

children.label: B
children.text: submits a certification described under paragraph (2) to the Federal officer making the appointment.

children.heading: .—Certification
children.label: 2 .—Certification
children.text: A certification referred to under paragraph (1) is a certification that the individual is expected to be discharged or released from active duty in the armed forces under honorable conditions not later than 120 days after the date of the submission of the certification.

children.label: A
children.text: meets the definition of a disabled veteran under section 2108(2), except for the requirement that the individual has been separated from active duty in the armed forces under honorable conditions; and

children.label: B
children.text: submits a certification described under paragraph (2) to the Federal officer making the appointment.

children.heading: .—Certification
children.label: 2 .—Certification
children.text: A certification referred to under paragraph (1) is a certification that the individual is expected to be separated from active duty in the armed forces under honorable conditions not later than 120 days after the date of the submission of the certification.

children.heading: .—Preference Eligible
children.label: c .—Preference Eligible
children.text: Subsections (a) and (b) shall apply with respect to determining whether an individual is a preference eligible under section 2108(3) for purposes of making an appointment in the competitive service.
